ab: asapu cu a ku mahlava siasuhlatʉ.
en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: umauhli aku ihlau.
en: I can lend you.

ab: asapu cu a ku mahlava ’aratingi.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ku aku ahlava mʉmʉa, muasa ita pu’a.
en: B: I don’t have one either, let’s go buy one.

ab: hlaa pu’a ita siasuhlatʉ a’ʉ i ia?
en: A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: a’ʉ, tumua ku mana pu’a siasamusu.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: hlaa pu’a ita kuamaivʉvʉrʉnga a’ʉ i ia?
en: A: Let’s go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: sianata, hliumucuaku salia.
en: B: No, I’ve already eaten at home.

ab: asapucu cu a ku paracici cʉrʉ.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: alu pasakulai paracici.
en: B: Take it to the heat!

ab: asapu cu a ku mahlava cʉrʉ.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: kʉlʉsa ita umuu ciri ku na!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let’s eat my lunch box together!

ab: ngasa aani u mahlipapu?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: tumua ku umau kuamamahlipapu a isa ariatʉkʉrana.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: ngasa aani u mahlipapu?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: hlimahlava ku cʉrʉ arinani, kʉlʉsa ita mau umuu kumamahlipapu.
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I’ve brought a lunchbox today, let’s eat together at noon!

ab: hlaa muasa ita pi taʉhlʉkai a’ʉ i ia?
en: A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?

ab: a’ʉ hlamau.
en: B: Okay! Let’s go.

ab: hlaa muasa ita maritʉkʉ taʉhlʉkai a’ʉ i ia?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: ku, tumua ku umiiapʉ.
en: B: No, I want to study.

ab: tumalʉlʉvʉ kia ihlaku umala vʉtʉraʉ.
en: A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: a’ʉ, kani’i vʉtʉraʉ na avuri ku ihlau.
en: B: Okay, here’s a broomstick for you.

ab: talʉlʉvani aku umala sipasasahli a’ʉ i ia?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: maivavʉvʉtʉraʉ aku, auhlunu a Amahlʉ na tumalʉlʉvʉ ihlau umala.
en: B: I’m sweeping the floor and you asked Amahlʉ to carry it for you.

ab: makilipingi cu i?
en: A: Are you done sweeping?

ab: makilipingi cu aku.
en: B: I swept it.

ab: tairau ku paivavʉtʉraʉ?
en: A: Why don’t you clean up?

ab: makilipingi cu aku.
en: B: I’ve finished cleaning up.

ab: tam ’aʉrʉ a sasaruana na, cu samusu.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: a’ʉ, muasa ku umala sipasasahli.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go get the cloth.

ab: tam ’aʉrʉ a kana’a cingarʉ na.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: cucuvanana, kuna ku pailalʉpʉngʉ naani na.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I’m not done sweeping here yet.

ab: ngasa ta’iara u cucuvanana?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: muasa ku ukikirimi pakiaturua?
en: B: I’m going to see my teacher.

ab: ngasa ta’iara macu u taluvaʉlʉ umiiapʉ?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: muasa ku kiʉlʉsʉ tukucu pahlusahli.
en: B: I’m going to sing with my friends.

ab: ngasa ta’iara isa kana’ana maci taluvaʉlʉ umiiapʉ?
en: A: What’s he doing after school?

ab: muasa kana’ana makahlangulu.
en: B: He’s going swimming.
